subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 294712621 is not a GRB
body:
V.Chaplin (UAH) reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 294712621
(100505.026) at 00:36:59.61 UT on 05 May 2010, tentatively
classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to local particles."
